title: cyclosorus clavipilosus
intro: Cyclosorus clavipilosus, also known as the Java fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves of Cyclosorus clavipilosus are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
